merlin_thesis: Bullish bias with medium confidence. Price swept BSL above 30K (30,329) then pulled back sharply into H4 discount (18.5% of range). This is classic turtle-soup/BSL sweep: smart money grabbed liquidity above 30K, now pulling back into discount for accumulation. D1 structure remains HH/HL since May 19 SSL sweep at 28,663. Expect bounce from 29,700-29,800 H4 discount zone during NY Kill Zone.
